category_sources: source_facts.description says library and tools for information extraction; official GitHub README describes MITIE as information extraction tools with NER and relation detection.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mitie; official GitHub README title is MITIE: MIT Information Extraction.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with setup, command-line usage, language examples, and API notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mit-nlp/MITIE; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says MITIE provides named entity extraction, binary relation detection, training tools, and language bindings.
